description_long: This is a detached residential house with a prominent front yard, bordered by a low fence and featuring a straight walkway leading to the main entrance. The house has two visible stories, with a gable roof and several dormer windows on the upper level. The facade includes symmetrical window placement and a central front door, flanked by small trees and landscaping elements. The side views reveal additional windows and a rear extension, suggesting a spacious interior layout. The roof is primarily pitched, with a flat section at the rear, and the exterior appears to be finished in light-colored materials. The property is set within a fenced lot, with clear separation from the surrounding environment.
description: A two-story detached house with a gable roof, symmetrical windows, and a fenced front yard with landscaping. The exterior is light-colored and features a central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, symmetrical windows, front yard, and fence.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the house, additional windows, and the rear extension.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back facade, flat roof section, and more windows.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with visible yard, trees, and the side profile of the house.
attribute_entryway_design: Central front door with steps, flanked by windows and small landscaping, no porch or columns.
